title: Verify display of TRUE flagged behavioral health conditions
description: Ensure that only conditions flagged as TRUE are displayed

steps.action:
Load patient card
2. Observe displayed list of conditions

title: Verify display of green tick for TRUE flags
description: Validate visual indicator for TRUE conditions

steps.action:
View the Behavioral Health Diagnoses card
2. Observe flag icons for TRUE conditions
steps.expected_result: Green tick mark (✔) appears beside TRUE conditions

title: Verify display of '--' for FALSE flags
description: Ensure that conditions with FALSE flag are represented as '-'

steps.action:
Open Behavioral Health Diagnoses card
2. Check flags for FALSE conditions
steps.expected_result: --' appears in place of tick mark for FALSE flags

title: Verify alphabetical order when >10 conditions
description: Ensure only 10 alphabetically sorted TRUE conditions are displayed

steps.action:
Open Behavioral Health Diagnoses card
2. Observe list order
steps.expected_result: Only 10 conditions shown in alphabetical order

title: Verify handling when <10 TRUE conditions
description: Ensure system correctly displays available conditions

steps.expected_result: All available conditions are displayed (less than 10) without error

title: Verify card title
description: Ensure correct title text appears per design

steps.action: Observe title of Behavioral Health Diagnoses card

title: Verify grid layout of card
description: Validate grid layout (Condition name left, tick/flag right)

steps.action: Observe Behavioral Health Diagnoses card layout
steps.expected_result: Condition name is left-aligned, tick/flag right-aligned in grid layout

title: Verify font and spacing
description: Validate UI style consistency with Figma design

steps.action: Compare font and spacing with Figma design
steps.expected_result: Font size, spacing, and alignment match design standards

title: Verify behavior when no TRUE flags exist
description: Ensure proper message or empty state handling

steps.expected_result: No data rows displayed or message “No behavioral health conditions found” shown
